Jan. 15, 2025 Managing High Blood Pressure Learn steps you can take to lower your risk for health problems from high blood pressure. Dec. 13, 2024 Preventing Prevent high blood pressure and lower risk for heart attack and stroke through healthy living habits Risk Factors There are several causes of or risk factors for high blood pressure, many you can control. For Professionals Pharmacist’s Patient Care Process Approach Guide The guide is to engage pharmacists in patient hypertension management. Dec. 13, 2024 Team-Based Care to Improve Blood Pressure Control Team-based care is a strategy implemented at the health system level. Dec. 13, 2024 The Surgeon General's Call to Action to Control Hypertension This resource seeks to avert the negative health effects of hypertension by identifying evidence-bas Rapid Evaluations of Telehealth Strategies to Address Hypertension Telehealth is a strategy for providing care to patients with high blood pressure. High Blood Pressure Communications Toolkit These resources can help your networks understand the basics of hypertension. Featured High Blood Pressure Facts Learn statistics and other facts about high blood pressure (hypertension) in the United States. Jan. 3, 2025 High Blood Pressure During Pregnancy Learn about how you can prevent and treat high blood pressure during pregnancy. Dec. 13, 2024 High Blood Pressure  High blood pressure increases the risk for heart disease and stroke, two leading causes of death for Americans.
